title: HOT WEATHER INFORMATION - 211info
text: MALHEUR COUNTY EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT HOT WEATHER INFORMATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about local hot weather events and sign-ups for community alerts. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours Visit Website INTAKE PROCEDURE: -Community alerts: Visit website -Hot weather information: Visit www.facebook.com/malheurco.org/?fref=ts# FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Malheur County Services: Extreme Heat Advisories/Warnings If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
